text.title: Agents ReAct Pattern — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output code.

list.item: Input: Use case.
Action: Author typed tools + FinalAnswer tool.
Output: tools.py + finals.py.
Decision gate: If FinalAnswer requires structured output, define its schema.
Input: Tools list, examples.
Action: Prompt template requiring Thought + Action JSON.
Output: prompt.txt with placeholders.
Decision gate: If examples too long, move to few-shot file.
Input: Tools, prompt, model client.
Action: Implement react_loop(task, tools, max_iters) returning final answer + audit log.
Output: react_loop.py + tests.
Decision gate: If parsing is fragile, switch to provider tool-use API.
Input: Loop + logger.
Action: Wrap each iteration; emit structured rows.
Output: JSON audit per run.
Decision gate: If logs flood, sample at session boundaries.
Input: Eval suite.
Action: Run eval; measure (success_rate, avg_iters, $/task); iterate.
Output: Eval report.
Decision gate: If avg_iters > cap, increase cap OR improve tools.
